name: Tso Kar Lake
description: Known as the 'White Lake' due to the thick crusts of salt surrounding its edges. It is a highly fluctuating salt lake in the remote Rupshu Plateau.
history: Historically a major source of salt for the Changpa nomads who traded it for goods across Ladakh and Tibet.
famousFor: Salt deposits, Kiangs (Tibetan wild asses), bird watching.
